label: Room part barricade
description: A room part that places barricaded door structures. Inherits from RoomPartDef.

stuffDef.label: Stuff
stuffDef.description: Material (ThingDef) used when placing the wall, if it is stuffable.

steps.label: Steps
steps.description: Number of barricade wall steps placed per door.

offset.label: Offset
offset.description: Cell offset from the door at which barricades begin.

chancePerDoor.label: Chance per door
chancePerDoor.description: Probability that each door in the room receives a barricade.
